stimulus: Several radio stations ______blank the Vietnamese-speaking community of Southern California, including Saigon Radio and Little Saigon Radio.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is the use of verb forms within a sentence. A main clause requires a finite (tensed) verb to perform the action of the subject ("several radio stations"), and this choice supplies the finite present tense verb "broadcast to" to indicate that the stations broadcast to that community.

Choice A is incorrect because the nonfinite participle "broadcasting" doesn't supply the main clause with a finite verb. Choice B is incorrect because the nonfinite participle "having broadcast" doesn't supply the main clause with a finite verb. Choice C is incorrect because the nonfinite to-infinitive "to broadcast" doesn't supply the main clause with a finite verb.
